guide_title: This 1.5 Trillion Industry Still Runs on Paper and Fax Machines
insight_canon_verbatim: What it takes for us to win only becomes cheaper, but what it takes for somebody else to catch up only gets more expensive. The Halo Business combines hardware physique (electronic shelf labels, POS), IA native, paiements, regulation gouvernementale, et operations de deploiement en magasin.
concept_cles: Wedge-then-Expand: pain point etroit puis full-stack system
Halo Business: heavy asset, low obsolescence, moat contre thin AI wrappers
Self-Driving Grocery: System of Record + System of Action + System of Transaction
P&L-Coupled Selling: chaque pitch lie a sales/gross margin/labor chiffres
outils_souverains_alignment: Vori 3 agents IA autonomes vers A3 Zero Protostar + agents H1 Isaac
System of Record unique ledger vers ASpace PARC canon + wiki junction
P&L-Coupled Selling chiffre vers A2 USS Discovery LD02 Finance + 12WY Rocks
Wedge-then-Expand trajectory vers Life-OS-2026 ALPHA multi-tenant progression
Halo Business moat anti-thin-wrapper vers ADR-SOBER-002 Anti-Paperclip kernel
anti_paperclip_rationale: Aucun greenwashing: Vori chiffre un impact P&L reel (+20-25% sales, +7-10pts marge, 1-2 employes redeployes) sans dumping captif. Opex operationnels <15% MR via paiements (60% revenu) en system of transaction, LTV:CAC implicit >=3:1. Pas de lock-in predator.
